creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to UnR34L from comment #0)

> Updated to latest version now the service wont start. Reverting to 383236 fixed it.

 FreeBSD 9.x is no longer supported by teamspeak. The minimum version required is 10.1. Also declares 10.2(or libc++ from ports/pkgs) is required in 3.0.13

source: http://forum.teamspeak.com/threads/123250-TeamSpeak-3-Server-3-0-12-3-released


 Because it is closed source, it is not fixable(Correct me if I'm wrong). I suggest we make a slave port for 3.0.11.4 and add this to UPDATING.
